sections.text: Approve the **single shared staging environment** — it removes the two-week integration bottleneck at a cost of $8k/month, and can be decommissioned after cutover.

sections.heading: Cutover architecture at a glance
sections.caption: Target-state flow, v1.3.
paragraphs: The cutover runs source and target in parallel for one accounting period, with the reconciliation layer comparing balances nightly.
Rollback is possible until the *final* reconciliation sign-off — after that the source system becomes read-only.

terms.definition: The switch from the legacy system to the new platform, including the parallel-run period.
A migration batch — one region's data moved and reconciled as a unit.
Red / Amber / Green status against plan.

sections.heading: Questions between steerings
sections.lead: Raise anything urgent directly — otherwise the PMO inbox is triaged daily.

sections.heading: Decisions requested today
sections.lead: One decision unblocks the red workstream; one keeps us ahead of plan.

cards.heading: Endorse
cards.text: External trainer contract to unblock Change & Training.
